member.param: The audio stream to get layout.

member.name: F:MediaBrowser.Controller.MediaEncoding.EncodingHelper.ContainerValidationRegexStr
member.summary: The codec validation regex string. This regular expression matches strings that consist of alphanumeric characters, hyphens, periods, underscores, commas, and vertical bars, with a length between 0 and 40 characters. This should matches all common valid codecs.

member.name: F:MediaBrowser.Controller.MediaEncoding.EncodingHelper.LevelValidationRegexStr
member.summary: The level validation regex string. This regular expression matches strings representing a double.

member.name: M:MediaBrowser.Controller.MediaEncoding.EncodingHelper.ContainerValidationRegex
member.remarks:
Pattern:
^[a-zA-Z0-9\\-\\._,|]{0,40}$
Explanation:
○ Match if at the beginning of the string.
○ Match a character in the set [,-.0-9A-Z_a-z|] atomically at most 40 times.
○ Match if at the end of the string or if before an ending newline.

member.name: M:MediaBrowser.Controller.MediaEncoding.EncodingHelper.LevelValidationRegex
member.remarks:
Pattern:
-?[0-9]+(?:\\.[0-9]+)?
Explanation:
○ Match '-' atomically, optionally.
○ Match a character in the set [0-9] greedily at least once.
○ Optional (greedy).
○ Match '.'.
○ Match a character in the set [0-9] atomically at least once.

member.name: M:MediaBrowser.Controller.MediaEncoding.EncodingHelper.WhiteSpaceRegex
member.remarks:
Pattern:
\\s+
Explanation:
○ Match a whitespace character atomically at least once.
